_comment: BASELINE Radar live-run profile ('default') — the canonical record of how we run the Worker for a live measurement. run-radar.ps1 always loads this as the base; other profiles overlay small deltas on top. Machine-specific bits are NOT in here: the output directories and the SEC User-Agent (a real contact email) are supplied by run-radar.ps1 at runtime. Scoring is intentionally omitted so it uses the code defaults (radar-formula-v5; MediaReachWeight 0.10 post-spec-94; fingerprint radar-scoring-fp-55270b9d8fad post-spec-95, which folds the enabled collector set — by concrete IEvidenceCollector.CollectorName, e.g. rss's is

tokens in the Collectors list above — plus the extractor rule-set identity into the fingerprint). 'secform4' (spec 93 SEC Form 4 insider-transaction collector) was promoted into the baseline on 2026-07-05 after its live re-measure validated directional insider buy/sell signals.
